cards.afterText: If the opposing fighter was defeated, search your deck for any card and add it to your hand, then shuffle your deck.
cards.title: Trophy Hunter

cards.immediateText: If your fighter is in a zone the opposing fighter is not in, cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Hunter's Guile

cards.immediateText: The value of your opponent's attack or defense is 0 and cannot be changed by card effects. (Other card effects still happen.)
cards.title: Impossible to See

cards.afterText: If you lost the combat, look at your opponent's hand.
cards.title: Adaptive Methods

cards.duringText: This card has +2 value for each zone the opposing fighter is in.
cards.title: Hunting Grounds

cards.duringText: Each of your fighters deals 1 damage to each opposing fighter adjacent to them.
cards.title: The Jungle Come Alive

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, the Predator recovers 2 health.
cards.title: Distracted Triage

cards.duringText: Your opponent discards 1 random card. Add its BOOST value to this card's value. Then, your opponent may move their fighter a number of spaces up to its BOOST value.
cards.title: Thrill of the Hunt

cards.immediateText: Return your opponent's defense card to their hand. They must play a card with a different name to defend. If they cannot, they must reveal their hand and play no card instead.
cards.title: Thermal Vision

cards.basicText: You may play this card face up.
cards.duringText: If you played this card face up, you may BOOST this attack.
cards.title: Worthy Prey

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, deal damage to the opposing fighter equal to their card's BOOST value.
cards.title: Accepted Challenge

cards.basicText: Move all opposing fighters in your fighter(s) zones up to 2 spaces each. Then, if one of your fighters is adjacent to an opposing fighter, gain 1 action.
cards.title: Mimicry

hero.name: The Predator
hero.specialAbility: After you attack, if there are no opposing fighters adjacent to the Predator, gain 1 action.

hero.name: The Predator
hero.specialAbility: At the start of the game, place 4 CLOAK tokens in your starting zone instead of placing the Predator. Treat each CLOAK token as a 1 health sidekick. When there is only 1 CLOAK token on the board, swap it for the Predator and flip this card. (You cannot lose the game until this card has been flipped.)

sidekick.name: Sidekick
sidekick.quote:
"There's something out there waiting for us. And it ain't no man."
                                                                  -Billy

name: The Predator
note:
Customized JSON for TTS with models and dials and etc: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1rk6aBItjUDrSLSbj0qa7sW5KjBFzPLjy/view?usp=sharing
Images with bleed at 600dpi for printing: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1PqPvCb2goMK6BuDqf2k_yv51iWrMPd6r/view?usp=sharing
Images with no bleed at 600 dpi with card backgrounds and correct layouts: https://drive.google.com/file/d/18OTF_j0HWCzOznOHjH6wKwTvxaFB1j6W/view?usp=sharing
Finally calling this one. Tested this version and the previous and I'm comfortable calling this completed. 
v1.0 - Another overhaul. Main mechanical changes are Thrill of the Hunt's action gain has been transitioned to the Predator's special ability, and all cards have been reverted to be usable by the Predator in both phases.

Trophy Hunter modified from Gary_M's Jungle Hunter.
